title: Variable number of arguments (vararg) : Kotlin
summary: Sometimes we need a function where we can pass n number of parameters, and the value of n can be decided at runtime. Kotlin provides us to achieve the same by defining a parameter of a function as vararg . We can pass n number of parameters to a vararg variable of the defined datatype or even of a generic type.
content: Sometimes we need a function where we can pass n number of parameters, and the value of n can be decided at runtime.
